/usr/bin/ar qc libindicatorpowerservice.a CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/brightness.c.o CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/datafiles.c.o "CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/device-provider-mock.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/device-provider-upower.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/device-provider.c.o" CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/device.c.o CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/notifier.c.o CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/testing.c.o CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/service.c.o "CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/dbus-powerd.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/dbus-battery.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/dbus-testing.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicatorpowerservice.dir/dbus-accounts-sound.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libindicatorpowerservice.a
